# SecItemAttr.typeItemAttr

**Case**

Identifies the type attribute.

## Declaration

```swift
case typeItemAttr
```

## Discussion

You use this tag to set or get a value of type `FourCharCode` that represents the item’s type.
title: SecItemAttr.typeItemAttr
